description_long: This object is a detailed model of a residential compound featuring multiple single-story houses arranged around a central courtyard and connected by paved walkways. The houses have a mix of gable and hip roofs, with visible red and brown tiling, and are surrounded by landscaped greenery, including trees and shrubs. There is a large rectangular lawn or park area on one side, and a parking lot with several cars on the opposite end. The buildings display a blend of traditional and modern architectural elements, with arched windows, brick facades, and some flat-roofed utility structures. The compound is enclosed by low walls and features several entry points, including a main entrance with a driveway. The overall layout suggests a suburban or semi-urban neighborhood setting, designed for communal living with shared outdoor spaces.
description: A residential compound with multiple single-story houses, landscaped gardens, a large lawn, and a parking lot, arranged around central walkways and courtyards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main houses, central courtyard, and large lawn area with visible trees and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the lawn, the rear of the houses, and the connection to the parking area.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the parking lot, utility buildings, and the back entrances of the houses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, additional utility structures, and the side of the main houses.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a prominent door, small porch, and steps, with some houses having overhangs and decorative columns.
